title: Medical Promotion and Marketing Mission and Vision
content:
Medical Promotion and Marketing Mission and Vision

MEDICAL PROMOTION AND MARKETING MISSION

The institutions serving in the health sector need;

Equipped with basic business and management information,

It can be easily employed in the upper, middle and lower level management

duties of pharmaceutical companies,

Capable of finding jobs in all large and small pharmaceutical companies,

Thinking objectively and having problem solving ability,

Assertive and successful in social relations

To train professional staff and executive candidates.

win the title of the fastest programs that meet the needs of the sector within the

existing programs in Turkey.
